nasb.text: ‘Behold, days are coming,’ declares the Lord, ‘when I will fulfill the good word which I have spoken concerning the house of Israel and the house of Judah.

esv.text: “Behold, the days are coming, declares the Lord, when I will fulfill the promise I made to the house of Israel and the house of Judah.

cnv.text: “看哪！日子快到，我必實踐我向以色列家和猶大家應許賜福的諾言。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“看啊，时候将到，我要实现我给以色列人和犹大人的美好应许。
